response.justification: Wei has an exceptionally strong technical background with over 15 years of experience and highly relevant projects in engineering productivity, testing infrastructure, and developer tools. However, the resume lacks any evidence of formal people management, conducting performance reviews, or holding 1:1s, which are mandatory requirements for this Level II Engineering Manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and testing infrastructure, including CI/CD pipelines, test runners, and assertions libraries.
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through Staff-level roles, open-source platform development, and organizing technical workshops.
Solid mobile platform knowledge, having developed iOS/Apple TV applications and an in-house mobile device orchestration tool.
concerns: Zero documented experience in formal people management, conducting 1:1s, or managing team performance and career development.
Lacks evidence of leading organizational change or setting strategic roadmaps aligned with broader business objectives.
Career trajectory has been strictly focused on individual contributor (IC) and technical craftsmanship rather than engineering management.
